CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2021 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS JIMENO RODRIGUEZ and VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is moot in light of the demurrer ruling. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Defendant Marlon Austria, Drm Holdings, Inc. Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS MARLON AUSTRIA and DRM HOLDINGS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege a viable cause of action against buyer's agent/broker. Plaintiff must allege facts (not conclusions) in good faith to support each element of each cause of action including but not limited to facts re: brokers/agents' knowledge of the foundation and garage door defects or obligation to discover such defects. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Plaintiff must allege facts (not conclusions) in good faith to support each element of each cause of action including but not limited to facts re: brokers/agents' knowledge of the foundation and garage door defects or obligation to discover such defects.
